flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at Mercy College of Ohio vs the 2018–2022 baseline (982 vs 1.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mercy College of Ohio fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 939).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mercy College of Ohio fell 15% between 2006 and 2009 (50.0% → 42.4%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Mercy College of Ohio rose 284% between 2021 and 2024 (4.2% → 16.0%).
